title: Beyond Optimized
description:
Beyond Optimized is a Minecraft modpack that focuses on improving the performance over vanilla, and adding features like shaders, better grass, zoom, etc...

Some of the mods include Sodium, Lithium, Entity Culling, Zoomify, etc...
body:
# What Is Beyond Optimized?

**Beyond Optimized** is a Minecraft modpack meant to improve performance over vanilla while adding features like **Shaders**, **Zoom**, **Better Grass**, **Connected Textures**, etc...

# Performance Uplift

**Beyond Optimized** is faster than vanilla thanks to **modern performance mods** some including: **Sodium**, **Lithium**, **Entity Culling**, **Ferrite Core**. All of which are mods that are well recognized within the Minecraft modding community.
# Features

**Beyond Optimized** includes many features from **OptiFine**, While adding a big performance uplift over **OptiFine**, and ofcourse **vanilla** itself, features like **Better Grass**, **Better Snow**, **Connected Textures**, **Zoom**, **Shaders**, etc...
